# BUG: comments inside a moved function body are silently dropped. Both
# free-standing line comments (// Step 1) and trailing inline comments
# on statements vanish on move; the destination keeps the code shape
# but every // line inside the func {…} body is gone, replaced by blank
# lines (gofmt artefact of the missing CommentGroup).
#
# Hit across most splits in the gojure project — every Implementer
# function in resolve.go, infer.go, emit.go, lower.go had `// Step 1
# …` / `// Walk pairs …` style guidance comments that orchestrate the
# function body. The doc audit after 6 splits had to hand-restore ~80
# in-body comments by re-extracting from `git show HEAD:<file>`.
#
# Expected fix: sflit's go/printer must run with the full *token.FileSet
# preserved across move so go/ast.CommentGroup nodes anchored to body
# statements survive the round-trip. Currently the printer is run with
# a fresh comment slice that only contains decl-level docs.

exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Foo$' -move
cmp small.go expected_small.go

-- big.go --
package p

func Foo() int {
	// Step 1: compute base value.
	x := 10
	// Step 2: apply transformation.
	y := x * 2 // double it
	return y   // tail
}

func Bar() int {
	return 0
}
-- expected_small.go --
package p

func Foo() int {
	// Step 1: compute base value.
	x := 10
	// Step 2: apply transformation.
	y := x * 2 // double it
	return y   // tail
}
